_comment: Lender profile. Cares about filing discipline, charges, insolvency recency, and repayment capacity signals. Strictest on winding-up history and overdue accounts.

_notes._profile: Use for: lenders, invoice finance providers, asset finance, property finance, trade credit decisions.
_notes._diff_from_default: Tighter filing thresholds (14/30 days vs 30/90). Winding-up petition window 60mo vs 36. Historic disqualification window 15yr vs 10. Recent charges (6mo) enabled as a signal.
